title: Tiger Bay
writer: Noël Calef, John Hawkesworth, Shelley Smith
actors: Hayley Mills, Horst Buchholz, John Mills
plot: A twelve-year-old tomboy witnesses the murder of a woman by her Polish merchant marine boyfriend, but bonds with him and thwarts the police in their investigation.
awards: Won 1 BAFTA Award2 wins & 4 nominations total
